2021-22 Davidson Wildcats Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 27-7 (15-3, 1st in A-10 MBB)

Coach: Bob McKillop

PS/G: 75.5 (57th of 358)

PA/G: 66.0 (78th of 358)

SRS: 10.43 (57th of 358)

SOS: 1.92 (115th of 358)

ORtg: 113.8 (14th of 358)

DRtg: 99.5 (153rd of 358)

Preseason Odds: Championship +20000

NCAA Tournament: (#10 seed in West)
Lost West First Round (74-73) versus #7 Michigan State

  • A-10 Reg Season Champ
